title: Lamb Koftas
excerpt: Ingredients 6 x raw, thawed lamb burger patties (from Woolies) 30 ml olive oil 30 ml finely chopped spring onions (green stalks and all) 30 ml finely chopped mint leaves 15 ml finely chopped garlic 15 ml roasted cumin seeds, coarsely crushed 5 – 10 ml dried red chilli flakes Method Put the lamb patties in a glass bowl and add the rest …
html:
Ingredients

  • 6 x raw, thawed lamb burger patties (from Woolies)
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 30 ml finely chopped spring onions (green stalks and all)
  • 30 ml finely chopped mint leaves
  • 15 ml finely chopped garlic
  • 15 ml roasted cumin seeds, coarsely crushed
  • 5 – 10 ml dried red chilli flakes

Method

Put the lamb patties in a glass bowl and add the rest of the ingredients.

Mix lightly with your hand or a fork and divide the mixture into 6 equal portions.

Press each portion of meat around a large sosatie skewer so that each kofta looks like a thickish sausage.

Grill over the coals or in a ridged griddle pan until just cooked through and still juicy.

Serves 4 – 6

Serve with lovely fresh tzatziki, lemon wedges and fine strips of mint leaves.

Easy!
